meanings.definition: a square dance figure; partners circle each other taking sideways steps
(ballet) quick gliding steps with one foot always leading

examples: many summer excursions to the shore
it was merely a pleasure trip
after cautious sashays into the field

meanings.definition: to walk with a lofty proud gait, often in an attempt to impress others
examples: He struts around like a rooster in a hen house

meanings.definition: perform a chasse step, in ballet
